options: To change the system's date and time

options: A calendar for the current month
Options to change the time zone

options: By clicking on the month name
By using the displayed forward/backward arrow buttons

options: In the time field located below the clock

evolution.
to understand the effects of these
stand how seasons take

Control Panel
Adjust your computer's settings
System and Security
Review your computer's status
Network and Internet
View network status and tasks
Hardware and Sound
View devices and printers
Add a device

Programs

Ease of Access

Changing Date and Time
Figure 1.5: Control Panel Window
Control Panel helps change your system's date and time to make sure it is accurate and
synchronised. You can even customise date and time according to your preferences.
Lab Session
Visit the lab and follow the given steps to change the date and time:
Click on the Clock and Region option in the Control Panel.
Select the Date and Time option. The Date and Time
dialog box will appear.
By default, the Date and Time tab is selected.
To Change Date
Click on the Change date and time button. The Date
and Time Settings dialog box will appear.
Select the current day in the calendar. You can change
the month using the displayed forward/backward arrow
buttons present on the calendar.
To Change Time
To change the hour, select the hour in the time field
located below the clock.
Click on the spin arrows to increase or decrease the
hours, as desired. Similarly, you can change the minutes
and seconds. Click on OK. The Date and Time settings of
the system will change accordingly.
Figure 1.6: Changing Date and Time
Figure 1.7: Date and Time
Settings Dialog Box
